metadata.description: Claude Code plugins by Helixir Labs. Agent-native productivity tools.

plugins.name: personal-knowledge-assistant
plugins.description: Agent-native PKM with interactive setup, ADHD-friendly planning (top-3 batching), inbox triage, daily/weekly reviews, and domain-based organization. Includes 6 skills and 2 agents.

plugins.name: helixir-ralph-workflow
plugins.description: Coordinated ralph workflow integrating flow-next task management with gstack quality gates. Patches default ralph templates for receipt-gated quality checks, two-pass task validation, and design review integration.

plugins.name: brilliant-gstack-connector
plugins.description: [WIP scaffold — skill body not implemented] Placeholder plugin intended to bridge the GStack design skills into Brilliant. Registered early so the author can develop against the Brilliant MCP. Not ready for installation by end users; the /design-brilliant skill is currently a stub and will no-op until the body is written.
